notes: Hardening from a self-review of this session's code: (1) the Bluetooth firmware transfer can't hang if a progress callback throws; (2) 'Try to reconnect' no longer marks Bluetooth unreachable when the first status read is briefly missed right after connecting; (3) the 'Reconnecting…' spinner clears the instant the device comes back (and now waits long enough for the Wi-Fi fallback) instead of vanishing after 12s.
